calendar.matters:
Petition To Enforce Arbitrator'S Subpoena
Off Calendar Nov-08-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows:
PETITIONER CALIFORNIA NURSES ASSOCIATION'S Petition To Enforce Arbitrator's Subpoena - To be heard at 9:00 am on the Discovery calendar. Judge: Marla Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR # 5976 = (302/MJM)

Petition To Enforce Arbitrator'S Subpoena
Off Calendar Nov-08-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Brendan White, 510.273.2273, appearing for the California Nurses Association;
Rachael Maxwell-Jolly, Hanson Bridgett, 415.777.3200, appearing for the Regents of the University of California;
Lori Ferguson, Hanson Bridgett, 916.442.3333., appearing for the Regents of the University of California.

Ruling: A R G U E D; Petition To Enforce Arbitrator's Subpoena is taken under submission. Court to prepare the order. Ernst Halperin, Judge Pro-Tem, Jacqueline Alameda, Clerk, Not Reported. =302/JPT
